subcodes.title: Words to Latimer, Esslemont, Randall et al, spoken on 1919-11-27
subcodes.first_line: Convey to the attendants in that Friday evening meeting my love and extend to them my longing. See what has happened to this world.... You must all do your best to increase love among the friends
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @light and darkness, @predictions and prophecies, @John the Baptist, @Christ; Christianity
